creator: mallorya@fastmail.com
text:
Created attachment 246449
Patch which implements RFC 8925

RFC 8925 "specifies a DHCPv4 option to indicate that a host supports an IPv6-only mode and is willing to forgo obtaining an IPv4 address if the network provides IPv6 connectivity."

If you have a client that supports RFC 8925, you can see it working by adding `option ipv6-only-preferred 300;` to your dhcpd.conf and verifying that your client does not have an IPv4 address.
